intention: 某品牌/公司一直拥有忠诚的顾客群
sentencePatterns: ___ has always had loyal customers because ___.
I have always been a loyal ___ customer.
realLifeExamples: CASIO has always had loyal customers because of its reliable and affordable designs.
I have always been a loyal Apple customer.
productionPrompts: 你怎么描述一个品牌拥有忠实用户？用 has always had loyal customers 说出来。
